name: youp-grid
description: Reusable TypeScript data grid core and UI adapters.
author: SeungyoupBaek

scripts.build: npm run build -w @youp-grid/core && npm run build -w @youp-grid/formula && npm run build -w @youp-grid/charts-echarts && npm run build -w @youp-grid/react && npm run build -w @youp-grid/vue && npm run build -w @youp-grid/vanilla
scripts.build:pages: npm run build && npm run build:demo
scripts.benchmark: npm run build -w @youp-grid/core && npm run build -w @youp-grid/formula && node scripts/benchmark.mjs
scripts.benchmark:check: npm run build -w @youp-grid/core && npm run build -w @youp-grid/formula && node scripts/benchmark.mjs --assert
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/core/dist packages/formula/dist packages/charts-echarts/dist packages/react/dist packages/vue/dist packages/vanilla/dist
scripts.publish:dry-run: npm publish -w @youp-grid/core --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --cache .npm-cache --dry-run && npm publish -w @youp-grid/formula --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --cache .npm-cache --dry-run && npm publish -w @youp-grid/charts-echarts --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --cache .npm-cache --dry-run && npm publish -w @youp-grid/react --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --cache .npm-cache --dry-run && npm publish -w @youp-grid/vue --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --cache .npm-cache --dry-run && npm publish -w @youp-grid/vanilla --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --cache .npm-cache --dry-run
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm test && npm run check:parity && npm run benchmark:assert && npm run pack:dry-run && node scripts/check-release.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:formula && npm run test:charts && npm run test:react && npm run test:vue
scripts.verify: npm run release:check && npm run test:smoke
